story: Mama went into the hospital again, then died on February 8. Baba told me to keep going to football practice at the Shooting Club. After practice, Omar said my mother died because I hadn’t said “inshallah.” I sat alone, staring at cockroaches and counting tile cracks. I started saying “inshallah” and promised not to miss prayers. After everyone left the field, Captain Abdallah quietly pulled Omar aside and told the assistant he would be in the locker room next practice to stop any taunting and to check on me. The next practice was the following afternoon.
implausible_knowledge: After everyone left the field, Captain Abdallah quietly pulled Omar aside and told the assistant he would be in the locker room next practice to stop any taunting and to check on me.
question: When he arrives for the next practice, how will he handle the locker room?
answer_with_knowledge: Go into the locker room at the usual time, expecting the coach to be there and trusting him to intervene.
answer_without_knowledge: Avoid the locker room and change on the field or in a bathroom stall to stay away from Omar.
